query:
ALTER TABLE payment_transactions
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS commissionAmount DECIMAL(12,2) NULL AFTER providerAmount,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS platformAmount DECIMAL(12,2) NULL AFTER commissionAmount,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS transactionSource ENUM('garbage','carrier','subscription') NULL AFTER platformAmount,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS appliedCommissionRate DECIMAL(5,4) NULL AFTER transactionSource;
